title: 100%Better
body:
# The Ultimate Vanilla Rework Resource Pack !

This resource pack is designed to greatly enhance vanilla Minecraft. 
It adds and modifies numerous 3D models of blocks, plants, leaves, items, and more. 
It give some connected textures.
It also reworks some textures to achieve a more natural look while staying as close as possible to the vanilla style.

For best results, I recommend these mods:
- Continuity (for connected textures) or Optifine
- William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld & Lithosphere (for amazing world generation)

### **Coming soon/work in progress :**
- all flowers
- all plants
- some blocks
- terrain blocks connected
- and many other things!

Join my Discord for updates and community chat : https://discord.gg/h95y7sTR4q

Please be patient, the pack is in progress. I take note of all feedback.
